message: Update to 1.2.1 - Accountancy DB fix (fee tables + ledger). Close Nova, install UPDATE NOW, then reopen.
releaseNotes: 1.2.1 - Fixes Accountancy 'no such table' errors and Ledger infinite loading. Creates academic_years, fee_types, fee_structures, fee_invoice_lines on startup for existing installs. Year Rollover stub no longer crashes. Clear novaAlert errors instead of spinning forever.
